productDisplayName: 2go Active Gear USA Men Pack of Two Red Jordan T-shirt
description: Pack of two inner t-shirts Soft, absorbent, red inner t-shirts made of 100% premium combed cotton with Lycra used for the neck to prevent de-shaping, has a round high neck, short sleeves, print on the inner neck for tag-less comfort and signature branding on the left chest. Wash care Machine wash Do not bleach or dry clean Tumble dry low Warm iron as needed If you need a basic tee to keep you feeling fresh under your shirt and provide a little warmth when the air conditioning gets too cold then you've found it here. 2Go knows what they're doing when they come up with practical basics which will make you look and feel great. Model statistics The product is a size M on a model of height 6' and shoulders 18"
